name: plaintext-labs
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y make && mkdir -p /home/vscode/.docker-clean && echo '{"auths":{}}' > /home/vscode/.docker-clean/config.json && echo 'export DOCKER_CONFIG=/home/vscode/.docker-clean' >> /home/vscode/.bashrc
postAttachCommand: echo 'plaintext-labs ready. Pick a lab:  cd <track>/<module> && make up'
